content: Garlic is part of the alium family and contains sulfur, which helps metabolize fats and reduces homocysteine levels, thereby decreasing liver inflammation.
Turmeric improves liver health by increasing the absorption of LDL cholesterol and reducing liver enzymes like alanine aminotransferase.
Beets contain pectin, which binds to and excretes toxins from the liver, and betaine, which aids in the detoxification process and glutathione production.
